docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY AMADEO, LATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT KELLEY-CAHILL, KARRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-22-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-09-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. PLAINTIFF LATRICIA AMADEO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KARRY KELLEY-CAHILL IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. INTHE EVENT THAT PLAINTIFF DOES NOT BELEIVE THE SETTLEMENT TERMS WERE COMPLIED WITH PLAINTIFF CAN RE-FILE HER CLAIM.
